name: Nash Powersports Phoenix
description_short: Nash Powersports is a multi-location Arizona powersports dealership offering new and pre-owned motorcycles, ATVs, side-by-sides, and PWCs with in-house financing options.
description_long:
Nash Powersports is a powersports vehicle dealership operating three retail locations in the Phoenix metropolitan area — Mesa, Phoenix, and Scottsdale. The company sells and finances new and pre-owned recreational vehicles, primarily serving Arizona residents who want to purchase motorcycles, ATVs, side-by-sides (UTVs), and personal watercraft (PWC). The dealership carries major brands including Honda, Kawasaki, Yamaha, Can-Am, and Sea-Doo.

Nash Powersports offers dealership financing for vehicle purchases, with advertised promotional APR rates as low as 0.99% on approved credit. Customers can apply for credit approval directly through the website. The dealership also runs an online trade-in valuation tool and lists both new and pre-owned inventory across all three locations. Manufacturer rebates and cash incentives are promoted regularly, including up to $3,500 off select Kawasaki models and $2,000 customer cash on select Yamaha models. Vehicle prices in their featured inventory range from approximately $4,988 for pre-owned motorcycles to over $12,977 for new utility vehicles.

Three physical locations across the Phoenix metro area give buyers flexibility to shop in Mesa, Phoenix, or Scottsdale. Spanish-speaking staff is available at all locations. The dealership maintains an active social media presence on Instagram, Facebook, and YouTube. Multiple phone lines and a dedicated sales email address (sales@nashpowersports.com) are listed for customer contact.

It is important to note that Nash Powersports is a retail vehicle dealership, not a financial services company or direct lender. The financing they advertise is vehicle-purchase financing, typically arranged through third-party lenders or manufacturer finance arms. Promotional rates such as 0.99% APR are marked 'OAC' (on approved credit), meaning buyers with poor or limited credit histories may not qualify for advertised rates. Consumers with credit challenges should clarify financing terms directly with the dealership before visiting.
pros: Promotional APR rates as low as 0.99% on select new vehicles for qualified buyers
Three Phoenix metro locations (Mesa, Phoenix, Scottsdale) for in-person shopping
Carries five major brands: Honda, Kawasaki, Yamaha, Can-Am, and Sea-Doo
Online credit pre-approval application available on the website
Both new and certified pre-owned inventory across all locations
Active manufacturer rebates and cash incentives ($1,500–$3,500 on select models)
cons: This is a vehicle dealership, not a lender — financing is arranged through third parties and terms are not disclosed online
All advertised APR rates are 'OAC' (on approved credit) — buyers with poor credit will likely face higher rates or denial
No published rate ranges, loan terms, or credit score requirements on the website
Service area is limited to the Phoenix, AZ metro — not available to out-of-state consumers
Minimum financing amounts are tied to vehicle purchase prices, which start near $5,000
best_for: Arizona residents with good-to-excellent credit seeking low promotional APR financing on a new powersports vehicle
Buyers looking to trade in an existing vehicle toward a new or used motorcycle, ATV, or side-by-side
Spanish-speaking consumers in the Phoenix metro area shopping for recreational vehicles
Buyers comparing new vs. pre-owned powersports options across multiple brands in one dealership
diagnosis: Nash Powersports is best for Arizona consumers with solid credit who want to finance a recreational vehicle purchase at a promotional rate through a multi-brand dealership. This company is not a consumer finance provider — it is a retail dealership, and its presence in a lending directory is based solely on its vehicle financing program. Consumers with credit challenges should call ahead to understand what financing options are realistically available to them before visiting.
services: New powersports vehicle sales (motorcycles, ATVs, side-by-sides, PWCs)
Multi-brand inventory (Honda, Kawasaki, Yamaha, Can-Am, Sea-Doo)
Three physical retail locations (Mesa, Phoenix, Scottsdale)
